Genesis PANZ
The 'Genesis' Collection
About the Collection
Genesis PANZ serves as your prime membership to Bamboolands, consisting of 888 recursive inscriptions stored entirely on Bitcoin Blockchain.

Lil Z's Adventure
The 'Gen 2' Collection
About the Collection
‘Lil Z's Adventure’ represents the cornerstone membership of Bamboolands, consists of 8,880 lil pandas with over 200 hand-drawn traits on the Ethereum blockchain.
